<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="7xaqo0fnL-xp0SJRWfy3" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-419" dy="-132" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Transformer Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="200" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0047AB;" value="ENCODER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="220" x="50" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_input_emb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Input Embedding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="80" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_pos_enc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Positional Encoding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="80" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_add1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="145" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" value="Encoder Layer x N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="190" x="65" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_mhsa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Multi-Head
Self-Attention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="85" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_addnorm1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="85" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_ff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Feed Forward
Network" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="85" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_addnorm2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="85" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7B0000;" value="DECODER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="530" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="220" x="520" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_output_emb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Output Embedding
(Shifted Right)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="550" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_pos_enc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Positional Encoding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="550" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_add1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="615" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" value="Decoder Layer x N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="390" width="190" x="535" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_mmhsa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;" value="Masked Multi-Head
Self-Attention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="555" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_addnorm1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="555" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_cross_attn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="Cross-Attention
(Encoder-Decoder)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="555" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_addnorm2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="555" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_ff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Feed Forward
Network" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="555" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out_linear" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Linear Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="550" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out_softmax" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Softmax" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="550" y="-30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out_probs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Output Probabilities" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="550" y="-90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_input_text" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Input Tokens" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="80" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_enc1" edge="1" parent="1" source="enc_input_text" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="enc_input_emb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_enc2" edge="1" parent="1" source="enc_input_emb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="enc_pos_enc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_enc3" edge="1" path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
